comment: Inbox-processor MOC alignment: reviewed proposed edits, did independent gap analysis, corrected 5 issues (wrong YAML mappings, fiction heading, one-liner format, context contract gaps, missing vault-check). Created shared kb-to-topic.yaml, applied 8 skill edits. First NLM export run will validate.

MOC pre-staging for BBP-006: 4 new canonical tags, 7 new MOC skeletons, pipeline KB_TO_TOPIC expanded (4→17), placement script built and validated against BBP-005 notes (20 entries placed across 5 MOCs, idempotent). Found and fixed pipeline scope bug and trailing-newline parser bug. Proposal reviewed and corrected — batch placement script withdrawn as redundant.

BBP-005 validation batch complete (20 notes, 0 vault-check errors, 100% canonical tags). BBP-006 full batch submitted (142 calls across 4 jobs via Google Batch API). Fixed manifest resume bug and JSONL mime type. Moved venv out of vault. 14 PDFs need OCR.

Fixed Tess memory system end-to-end: config validation fix, SOUL.md memory write instructions, date hallucination fix. Diagnosed misleading 'Memory search disabled' log (mechanic, not voice). Hardened Crumb ops access: sudoers NOPASSWD + group read + setgid. All 5 access paths verified working.

Memory search spec review (v1+v2), deployment to Tess voice agent. OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, hybrid search live. Resolved: Anthropic not supported as embedding provider. Cleared 256 stale openclaw inbox files.

Awareness-check: fixed octal hour bug + relayed dir perms. Vault-health: migrated from OpenClaw cron to bash+launchd (sandbox can't read vault). Health-ping: fixed UTC parsing. healthchecks.io wired. 2/4 M1 cron jobs now bash+launchd.
Inbox processing: 7 files routed. Created tess-operations project (3 Tess evolution docs). Created Domains/Software/ directory for 4 standalone cross-project docs. All frontmatter valid.

FIF-031 RSS adapter implemented — normalizer, adapter factory, 71 tests (all passing), capture-clock wiring, manifest enabled. Clean build, no regressions. Phase 0 validation paid off — zero field mapping surprises.

Code review overhaul deployed + first live review. Replaced 2-tier system with 2-reviewer panel (Opus API + Codex CLI). Fixed 3 hallucinated CLI flags before deploy. First live review on FIF-029 (16 files, 1455 lines): 1 critical (token refresh race), 9 significant, 7 minor. All 9 real findings fixed, 1 false positive documented. Panel complementarity validated — Opus caught security, Codex caught architecture.

FIF-030 RSS Phase 0 complete — 14 feeds validated (15 tested, 3 replaced), rss-parser@3.13.0 selected and tested, 8/8 sample normalizations to UnifiedContent passed, RSS manifest passes loadManifest(). Deliverables: feed list doc, manifest, feed config, preamble, 2 validation scripts. Clean build.

FIF-028 live migration complete — 463 posts migrated to framework schema, 7/7 verification checks pass. Fixed 3 bugs during execution (pkill self-destruct, broken symlink crash, verification false positive). Also fixed all 14 vault-check warnings — vault now CLEAN. M2 at 10/11 tasks.

FIF-027 integration test complete — 150 tests across 10 phases (capture→triage→route→digest→delivery→feedback→cost→integrity→idempotency→schema). Also updated stale M1 task tracking (FIF-009-018 were already done in initial commit). Fixed pre-existing orchestrator timing flake. Total suite: 2,301 tests across 25 suites, 0 failures. M2 now 9/11 tasks complete.

FIF-024/025/026 complete — verification suite (102 tests), orchestrator (88 tests), rollback procedure (59 tests). WP-8 migration toolkit fully done (5/5 tasks). M2 at 8/11. Total suite: 2,151 tests across 24 suites, 0 failures. Clean mechanical execution, no new patterns. WP-9 blocked on M1 runtime (FIF-009-018).

FIF-023 complete (116 tests, staging verified). Quick-capture skill deployed to Tess but non-functional — 4 test rounds exposed 3 failure modes (context anchoring, sandbox write limitation, skill router priority). Bridge path confirmed as working workaround. Parked for OpenClaw skill priority investigation.

FIF-023 Stage 3 migration complete. Vault file renames (feed-intel-{id} → feed-intel-x-{id}) + 6-variant Obsidian wikilink regex update. 116 tests, staging verified (73 files renamed), idempotency confirmed. Compound routing of 5 pending research insights also completed (3 new files, 1 edit). M2 now 5/11 tasks complete. Total suite: 1,902 tests.

X-feed-intel deploy + compound insight E2E test passed. But most of the session was ops firefighting: gateway stale token (401), 409 restart storm recovery, shared-bot polling conflict. Fixed by bot separation (@xfeed_crumb_bot), logOut recovery, openclaw-ops group for sudo-free access. Ops guide updated (§9-§11). Compound insight frontmatter validated end-to-end. 4 pending insights still unrouted.

crumb-tess-bridge DONE transition. Tier 1 code review (2 chunks, 27 raw findings → 5 real after filtering, no must-fix). Fixed test/code desync (context_files required→optional). Phase transition: IMPLEMENT→DONE. 37 tasks, 897 tests, 24 sessions, 7 days.

X-feed-intel context enrichment + human-readable research filenames. Implemented spec §5.8.1 enrichment (thread context + notable replies via TwitterAPI.io), new enrichment.ts module, rewrote handleResearch with 13-step flow. Then added slug-based naming (research-A01-karpathy-cli-agent-interfaces-20260225.md), switched dedup from file-existence to DB query, added path tracking in PendingResearch. 8 files, clean build.

Skill-level model routing. Reviewed draft change spec, identified missing delegation mechanism (Task tool model param), proposed phased rollout by context complexity. Implemented: model_tier on 14/15 skills, CLAUDE.md Model Routing section with concrete delegation instruction, skill-authoring-conventions update. inbox-processor deferred to Phase 3.

Code-review skill hardening. Fixed 7 pre-deployment issues, completed first Tier 1 review (FIF WP-7, 7 findings after filtering 5 hallucinations), executed external repo gate spec (git init FIF, .gitignore XFI, CLAUDE.md step 3b, vault-check check 22), reviewed post-deployment assessment, applied 2 structural SKILL improvements (test runner discovery order, scope confirmation gate). Bridge and XFI reviews prepped for next session.

Code-review skill deployment. Reviewed 4-file system (SKILL + 2 subagents + config) post-peer-review. Fixed 2 contract mismatches (C1: num_ctx/temperature parameter gap, C2: missing inline denylist patterns). Created shared review-safety-denylist.md. Updated gpt-5.2-codex → gpt-5.2. 5 files deployed.

M2 WP-7 complete (3/3). FIF-019 migration lockfile guard (both repos, 34 tests), FIF-020 staging env (442 posts verified), FIF-021 X adapter refactor (manifest, preamble, normalizer+factory, 60 tests). 1,649 tests across 19 suites. M2 now 3/11.

M1 complete (18/18). FIF-015 cost telemetry, FIF-016 guardrails (hysteresis), FIF-017 health monitoring (degraded state, shared alert sender, health check hook), FIF-018 research promotion path. 1,555 tests across 17 suites, 0 failures.
FIF-011 vault router (collision detection, 3-way chain test) + FIF-012 digest renderer (per-source, 4096 splitting, cadence/threshold). M1 now 12/18 done, 853 tests across 12 suites.
FIF-006 capture clock, FIF-007 lifecycle management, FIF-008 triage engine (high-risk). M1 now 8/18 done, 427 tests. Triage engine uses injectable LLM callback — fully testable without HTTP mocks.
PLAN→TASK transition + first 4 M1 tasks (FIF-001–004, 163 tests), web UI spec amendment v0.3.4 (§5.12-5.13, M-Web 8 tasks), FIF-025/026 AC amendments, Perplexity frontmatter fixes.

Gateway crash recovery — diagnosed dual launchd supervisor race (LaunchAgent + LaunchDaemon), disabled daemon, added ThrottleInterval, revoked/reissued bot token. SIGTERM source unresolved but cascade amplifier fixed.
Test runner subagent created (.claude/agents/test-runner.md). Second subagent extraction — zero-vault-read context contract, three runner parsers, structured return summary.

Web UI proposal review (7 decisions locked), XFI-00A Telegram verify (M0 12/12), XFI-014 capture clock (M1 5/5), 5-reviewer peer review with synthesis, 5 must-fix items applied and verified. M1 complete and hardened.
Minimal recovery session — completed interrupted session-end sequence (signal append, commit, push) from context-exhausted previous session.

Crash recovery + M0/M1 sprint. Fixed XFI-006 benchmark crash (timeout+incremental flush). Completed XFI-005 bookmark benchmark (194 posts), XFI-007 field mapping, XFI-00C dev harness, XFI-009 spec amendments (v0.4.3). Built M1 capture pipeline: normalizer (XFI-010), dedup (XFI-013), topic scanner (XFI-012), bookmark puller (XFI-011). 271 test assertions passing. M0 11/12, M1 4/5.

TMA-002 routing PoC complete. 30 scenarios tested, two-agent split confirmed. Critical finding: model.fallbacks doesn't trigger for provider-down. Limited Mode mechanism verdicts delivered (4a/4b/4c). Ollama installed, test config deployed. 5/14 tasks done.

Three TASK-phase tasks completed: TMA-005 (memory budget — 21.3GB peak, 51GB available, zero swap), TMA-010a (cache_control passthrough confirmed native), TMA-006 (persona eval — Haiku 100% all gates, Sonnet 71% PC-3). Voice model switched Sonnet→Haiku on evidence. 8/14 tasks done.

TASK phase — 4 writing tasks completed (TMA-001 routing spec, TMA-003 design contracts, TMA-004 Limited Mode protocol, TMA-012 environment pinning). 28 routing test scenarios, 5-layer enforcement architecture, self-contained model eval framework. 4/14 tasks done, remaining require Ollama installation.

SPECIFY phase spec written — 22 facts, 7 assumptions, 13 unknowns, 14 risks, 11 tasks. Incorporated 3 research inputs (routing, caching, cost analysis) plus operator review flags. Two-agent split architecture, dual critical paths identified.

Compound scan (13 deferred patterns evaluated, 0 promoted). Write-read path verification pattern doc created. Tess persona deployed to OpenClaw (IDENTITY.md + SOUL.md). Reference docs placed in vault.
Spec v2.0.2 (20 stale session-log paths fixed). Conditional session-end commit protocol applied to CLAUDE.md + spec. CTB-021 design review complete — 4 questions resolved, build unblocked.

v2026.2.21 upgrade runbook created, 4-model peer review (GPT-5.2, DeepSeek V3.2, Grok 4.1, Gemini 3 Pro). Critical npm_config_prefix bug caught by review. 2 must-fix + 7 should-fix applied. maxSpawnDepth reframed as T1 security. Blocked on upstream bundler corruption #22841.

CTB-012 governance verification test suite: independent verify-governance.js (sha256 hash + canary recomputation), watcher pipeline integration (discard + alert on failure), 308 tests all pass. Context resumed from compacted session.

CTB-011 file-watch + bridge runner: kqueue daemon, reject subcommand, lock wrapper, LaunchAgent, runbook. 280 tests (240 Node + 40 Python), all pass. Peer-reviewed plan executed cleanly. All 9 action items applied.
CTB-010 cost model complete (FULL GO). Recovered uncommitted work from crashed sessions. Clean but mostly mechanical — cost model built from existing token data.

M3 complete: CTB-015 Telegram UX + 4-model peer review + applied all findings (152 tests). Critical confirm_code bypass caught by 3/4 reviewers. Spec fixed for pre-governance errors per user feedback.
Lucidchart skill spec: deep research, peer review (3 reviewers), policy compliance doc, smoke test payloads + runner generated, spec draft→reviewed

TASK→IMPLEMENT phase transition + full deployment: directories, LaunchAgent (kqueue watcher running), shell wrapper, live e2e (query-status round-trip <1s with governance verification), Telegram rendering verification (4/4 adversarial payloads pass). Phase 1 bridge operational.

User code review findings applied (UUIDv7 parens, started_at tracking, ValueError test gap). 659 tests (363 Node.js + 296 Python), 0 failures. M9 multi-stage milestone complete.

CTB-022 peer review finding applied (partial deliverable preservation). CTB-024 structured escalation flow complete — Option A start/resume split, §6.2 schema validation, §6.5 answer resolution, 30-min timeout, escalation relay. 46 new tests, 708 total passing.

outcome: 8 fixes from 4-model peer review + human cross-reference, 16 new tests, 140 total passing

outcome: Bridge-watcher code review fix, CTB-028 draft review (10+ internal findings), 4-model peer review (9 consensus), all 11 action items applied. 40→58 CTB-028 tests, 867 total passing.

Spec bumped to v2.0.3, version history split into current (v2.x) and archive (v0.1-v1.9.1), companion note fix. Continuation session — clean execution.

signal: Action plan + tasks created, peer-reviewed (5 models, 14 findings applied), phase transition to TASK complete. 14 tasks, 3 milestones, dual critical path.

Project closed. Health-check cron built (external state machine for Limited Mode). Compressed voice prompt deployed to production (1,090 tokens). Maintenance runbook written. Milestone 3 exit gate passed (8/8 criteria). Phase TASK→DONE.

comment: M3 complete (7/7): feedback listener, cost guardrail, queue health, liveness check, ops guide. 617 tests across 13 suites. Fixed DRY_RUN leak sending live Telegram alerts from tests. All 4 milestones done (32/32 tasks).

Peer review skill agentic extraction — analyzed spec, resolved 5 gaps + 3 open questions, created first subagent (peer-review-dispatch), restructured SKILL.md from 8 steps to 6. Clean refactor, no new capabilities.

5-model peer review of M2/M3 (Attention Clock + Feedback & Operations). 78 findings across GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Pro, DeepSeek V3.2, Grok 4.1, Perplexity. 4 must-fix, 7 should-fix, 7 defer, 22 declined. Perplexity calibrated: 4/17 hallucinations on code review, restricted to spec/design artifacts via new artifact_types config field. Grok verdict: keep (73% issue rate after addendum).
